---
title: "Aulas da disciplina"
subtitle: "PPEC0039 — Estatística e Planejamento de Experimentos"
page-layout: full

listing:
  contents:
    - "Notebooks/*.ipynb"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 220px
  sort: "title"
  categories: true
  fields:
    - image
    - title
    - description
    - categories
---
